creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon Dec 25 16:11:25  2023 UTC, karels@freebsd.org wrote:
> Created attachment 247247
> updated crashinfo after applying patch
> 
> new crashinfo
On Mon Dec 25 17:21:38  2023 UTC, rozhuk.im@gmail.com wrote:
> It does not crash, but stop work after small time.
> Probably this related to
> https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=262357 (looks like some MAC
> filter management error)
> 
> As workaround I install intel adapter and disable realtek in bios :)
On Wed Dec 27 08:24:40  2023 UTC, glebius@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> On Mon Dec 25 16:10:15  2023 UTC, karels@freebsd.org wrote:
> > (In reply to Alex Dupre from comment #11)
> > The patch eliminates the epoch error, but the memory modification after free
> is
> > still there.  core.txt.9 will be attached.  I was able to ping and run ssh
> while
> > single user, but the system crashed as it came up multi-user.
> On Mon Dec 25 16:11:25  2023 UTC, karels@freebsd.org wrote:
> > Created attachment 247247
> > updated crashinfo after applying patch
> > 
> > new crashinfo

> > It does not crash, but stop work after small time.
> > Probably this related to
